rationale: Educ. Code §29.1543 governs early education reporting requirements and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The agency shall produce and make available to the public on the agency's Internet website annual district and campus-level reports containing information from the previous school year on early education in school districts and open-enrollment charter schools.
_note: Rule text concerns early education reporting; no nexus to homestead exemption amounts.
